registry_name: Z-Pattern Safe Universal Pattern Simulation Governance

source_blueprint.label: Any Predictions / Z-ANY blueprint
source_blueprint.note: Architectural inspiration only — gambling or monetisation segments MUST map to governance, simulation, or AMK-gated lanes; PDF stays out-of-band until translated.

signal_rules.GREEN: education/simulation/report-only uses with clear non-guarantee language
signal_rules.YELLOW: missing evidence, unclear domain mapping, or needs taxonomy tightening
signal_rules.BLUE: high-risk or gated domain — human/AMK review before any outward claim or connector
signal_rules.RED: betting advice, guaranteed prediction, live money flows, enabled forbidden claim paths, deploy, scraping, provider call, or PII vault surfaced as live
